ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "sex" INTEGER /* Sex of the patient (1 for male, 0 for female) */,
  "cholesterol" INTEGER /* Cholesterol level of the patient */,
  "resting_bp" INTEGER /* Resting blood pressure of the patient */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the patient in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the patient in kilograms */,
  "smoking_status" INTEGER /* Smoking status of the patient (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the patient record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the patient record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health metric entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient associated with the metrics */,
  "max_hr" INTEGER /* Maximum heart rate recorded for the patient */,
  "fasting_bs" INTEGER /* Fasting blood sugar level (1 for true, 0 for false) */,
  "oldpeak" REAL /* Oldpeak value representing ST depression induced by exercise relative to rest */,
  "heart_rate_variability" REAL /* Heart rate variability measured in milliseconds */,
  "blood_oxygen_level" REAL /* Blood oxygen level measured in percentage */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the health metric record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the health metric record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_metrics_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chest_pain_types" (
  "pain_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chest pain type entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient associated with the pain types */,
  "ata" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient has angina type ATA (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "nap" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient has angina type NAP (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "ta" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient has angina type TA (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "chest_pain_description" TEXT /* Description of the chest pain experienced by the patient */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the chest pain record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the chest pain record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pain_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chest_pain_types_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "doctors" (
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each doctor */,
  "doctor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the doctor */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the doctor */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience of the doctor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the doctor record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the doctor record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient associated with the appointment */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the doctor associated with the appointment */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of the appointment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the appointment (e.g., scheduled, completed, cancelled) */,
  "appointment_type" TEXT /* Type of appointment (e.g., in-person, virtual) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the appointment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the appointment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medications" (
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient receiving the medication */,
  "medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication prescribed */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the medication */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of medication intake */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the medication */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the medication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the medication record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the medication record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medications_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical event entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient associated with the history */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the health event or intervention */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the health event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., hospitalization, surgery, medication change) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the historical event record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the historical event record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_history_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wearable_data" (
  "wearable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wearable device entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient associated with the wearable device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of wearable device (e.g., smartwatch, fitness tracker) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data recorded (e.g., heart rate, steps taken) */,
  "data_value" TEXT /* Value of the data recorded */,
  "recorded_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was recorded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the wearable device record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the wearable device record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wearable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wearable_data_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient associated with the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., high heart rate, low blood oxygen level) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date of the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., doctor, nurse, patient) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user associated with the access log */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view patient data) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
